title: Flaky Jammy Russian Puff Pastry Bake
description: A paleo-friendly Russian dessert featuring caramel, glaze, and flaky pastry. Perfect for a weeknight treat.
instructions: Mix the almond flour, coconut cream, granulated sugar, egg, and salt in a bowl until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Spread the jam evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch (2.5 cm) border around the edges.
Fold the dough in half lengthwise and cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) wide strips.
Twist the strips into a braid and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
While the pastry is baking, mix the caramel sauce, water, and confectioners' sugar in a bowl to make the glaze.
Remove the pastry from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Drizzle the glaze over the warm pastry.
Serve warm or at room temperature, topped with powdered sugar if desired.
